results.description: Each pub type/trait in api/ must be in its own standalone file with the file stem matching the snake_case name

violations.message: api/ file 'main/src/api/body/scrubber/scrubber.rs' contains no pub type/trait declarations — every file in api/ must contain exactly one public interface item
violations.fix_hint: Add a public type/trait to the file, or move private helpers to a non-api module and delete this file.
